workflow_name: Browse Index and Related Objects via Direct Index Search

steps.description: Type option 1 to select DB2 system catalog on the DB2 Admin main menu
Press Enter to navigate to the System Catalog Objects screen
Type option X to select Indexes on the System Catalog Objects screen
Type an index name search pattern in the Name filter field to locate the target index
Press Enter to submit the filter and display the Indexes list
Type line command DIS in the Select field next to the target index to display its index space status
Press Enter to execute the DISPLAY DATABASE command and view the index space status output
Press PF3 to exit the command output and return to the Indexes list
Type line command T in the Select field next to the target index to navigate to its associated table
Press Enter to navigate to the Tables, Views, and Aliases list for the index's parent table
Type line command L in the Sel field next to the target table to list its rows
Press Enter to display the table row data
Press PF3 to exit the table row list and return to the Tables, Views, and Aliases screen
Press PF3 to exit the Tables, Views, and Aliases screen and return to the Indexes list
Type line command D in the Select field next to the target index to navigate to its parent database
Press Enter to navigate to the Databases list for the index's parent database
Type line command T in the Select field next to the target database to view all its tables
Press Enter to display the Tables, Views, and Aliases list for the selected database
Press PF3 to exit the Tables, Views, and Aliases screen and return to the Databases list
Press PF3 to exit the Databases list and return to the System Catalog Objects screen
Press PF3 to exit the System Catalog Objects screen and return to the DB2 Admin main menu
